tier_notes: Tier 2: Wikipedia source contains only qualitative gameplay descriptions. No specific physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, sub-pixel precision) are documented. Game is a fighting game focusing on character roster, modes, and gameplay mechanics rather than movement physics documentation.
